purpose: Canonical list of Finviz columns the weekly scan should pull, the dimension/gate each feeds, free-tier availability, and the delta columns to ADD (Earnings Date, ATR, Forward P/E, Inst Own, Insider Own). finviz_row_to_dims() matches by HEADER NAME, so any superset of columns works; to consume a new column you must (a) add it to your Finviz Custom view and (b) wire it in finviz_row_to_dims / a gate.
disclaimer: recommend-only research metadata. Finviz has no point-in-time API: stamp every pull with as_of = NYSE prior close and archive to raw/market_data/ per philosophy/09-point-in-time.md.

finviz_view.note: Overview (111) lacks technical/fundamental/ownership columns. Use Custom (152) with a column-id set. Column ids can vary per account; matching is by header name in finviz_row_to_dims, so a superset is safe. 2026-06-10: add the 5 headers in delta_done_2026-06-10.headers_to_add_to_custom_view ('Forward P/E','Earnings','ATR','Inst Own','Insider Own') to this view so the export returns them.
finviz_view.free_tier: Finviz free front-end shows the screener but limits to the first page and no CSV export. Elite (export?...&auth=TOKEN, ~$25/mo) gives full result set + CSV. This system uses Elite (FINVIZ_ELITE_API_KEY in .env). Columns marked free_tier:true are visible in the free screener tabs (Overview/Valuation/Financial/Technical/Ownership) for spot checks even without Elite.

_flags_via_finviz_row_to_flags.note: non-dim gates/levels; live in finviz_row_to_flags(), surfaced in outputs/finviz-scan-*.json under each row's 'flags' + top-level earnings_blackout/squeeze_watch/overshoot_200d lists

columns.notes: Section 232 overlay: raise threshold for hardware/assembly (only fat-margin names that can pass on tariff)
MOST important survival gate (>1.5) per finviz_screening_recipe.md
plan wants 'distance >30% = 乖離過大, reject chase' -> add overshoot guard
>20% -> runtime short_blacklist; >10% + weekly breakout -> short-squeeze watch
wired in finviz_row_to_dims (2026-06-10): pe_eff = Forward P/E when present else trailing P/E (growth names' trailing PE looks stretched)
wired in finviz_row_to_flags._days_to_earnings (2026-06-10); blackout window = risk_config.yaml earnings_blackout_tier1_days (3). Finviz header is 'Earnings' (e.g. 'Aug 26 AMC', 'Feb 19/a')

wired in finviz_row_to_flags + atr_position_size() (2026-06-10): stop = entry - k*ATR (k~2.5); shares = equity*risk_pct / (k*ATR), capped by position_caps_pct. risk_pct/cap are caller-supplied, helper does not read risk policy
wired in finviz_row_to_flags (2026-06-10): ownership LEVEL (distinct from Inst Trans change); IPO-drain defense tilt, not a gate
wired in finviz_row_to_flags (2026-06-10): paired with Short Float (>=10% each) for squeeze_watch pre-alert; breakout confirmed by rally 連續起漲

delta_done_2026-06-10.note: The 5 TO_ADD columns are now wired (Forward P/E into the valuation dim; Earnings/ATR/Inst Own/Insider Own into finviz_row_to_flags + atr_position_size). REMAINING manual step: add these 5 HEADER NAMES to your Finviz Custom view so the export returns them ('Forward P/E','Earnings','ATR','Inst Own','Insider Own') — matching is by header name, absent columns degrade to None.

weekly_presets._comment: From src/sharks/data/finviz_elite.py PRESETS + docs/finviz_screening_recipe.md. Pass a preset name or raw f= string to: python -m sharks.data.finviz_elite <preset>

gates._comment: Risk filters BEFORE return filters (finviz_screening_recipe.md). Finviz is the net; system (basecross/rally/stealth) decides life/death + 墓園守門.

overshoot.note: reject chase when price >30% above 200d MA (plan 乖離過大)

policy_overlay._comment: From thesis_policy_regime_2026.md — adjust weights/filters by policy, not buy signals.

section232_hardware.rationale: only fat-margin names can pass on 25% tariff

congress_overlay._comment: From thesis_congress_tracking.md — confirmation/confluence layer, NOT leading (STOCK Act 45-day lag).
congress_overlay.rule: intersect weekly /rally buy_consider with NANC/Pelosi disclosures -> star Tier-1 confluence (+1 confidence, never a standalone entry)
congress_overlay.do_not: do not scrape X/Twitter; use ETF holdings pages + CapitolTrades + House Clerk
